***REMOVED***path-type [![Build Status](https://travis-ci.org/sindresorhus/path-type.svg?branch=master)](https://travis-ci.org/sindresorhus/path-type)

> Check if a path is a file, directory, or symlink


#***REMOVED***Install

```
$ npm install --save path-type
```


#***REMOVED***Usage

```js
var pathType = require('path-type');

pathType.file('package.json').then(function (isFile) {
	console.log(isFile);
	//=> true
})
```


#***REMOVED***API

##***REMOVED***.file(path)
##***REMOVED***.dir(path)
##***REMOVED***.symlink(path)

Returns a promise that resolves to a boolean of whether the path is the checked type.

##***REMOVED***.fileSync(path)
##***REMOVED***.dirSync(path)
##***REMOVED***.symlinkSync(path)

Returns a boolean of whether the path is the checked type.
